title: Pass 5.E.3: ferrotorch-data MultiWorkerIter reinvents crossbeam/rayon primitives
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-data audit, ARCH_SMELL.

src/dataloader.rs:858-1111 — MultiWorkerIter re-implements a bounded SPMC work-queue (Mutex+Condvar+VecDeque+sentinel-None) plus a BinaryHeap reorder buffer plus an mpsc result channel — heavyweight reinvention of crossbeam/rayon primitives. The _handle: JoinHandle<()> on PrefetchIter (line 640) is also never observed; thread panics surface only as a closed channel.

Acceptance:
- Replace with crossbeam::channel::bounded + crossbeam::queue::ArrayQueue (or rayon::ThreadPool::scope)
- Surface worker-thread panics as Result errors, not silent channel closes
- Preserve current ordered-output semantics; existing tests should pass unchanged.
